title: MTR Craft
description: Make the Minecarft transit railway easier and more enjoyable to use!
body:
# IMPORTANT!!!

This ModPack contains CurseForge and Modrinth mods.

Therefore, it is not compatible with GDlauncher, CurseForgeApp, etc.

If you really want to play with these launchers, please use MTR Craft Lite.


## Cautions when playing with the Lite version

Lite version does not include some mods. (NTE, JCM, etc.).

Also, updates are not frequent.

If you still want to use the Lite version, please use the Lite version.


##Please join us on Discord!

[**Join the Discord**](https://discord.gg/t6hYy7wt93)

# Overview

This ModPack is designed to make playing Minecraft Transit railway fun and easy.
It has most of the mods you need.

Here are some of them in detail.




# Main Mod



## Minecraft Transit railway



This is the base of this modpack.

Without it, it would not be possible.

Adds main automated trains, boats, ropeways, and planes.



## The Tube (The London Underground)



Add-on for Minecraft Transit railway.

Adds items, blocks, etc. like those found in the world's oldest railroad station, the London Underground.



## Joban Client Mod



Add items and blocks like those found in Hong Kong MTR stations.



## Station Decorations



Adds many useful items to the station.



## Nemo's Transit Expansion


This mod makes the rails look realistic.


# Lightweight Mods.

### Optimize FPS with　

Sodium(Fabric)

Rubidium(Forge)

### The load of integrated servers and servers can be reduced with

Lichium(Forge)

Radium Reforget(Forge1.18~)

Performer(Forge1.16.5)

### Opifine's shaders can be used by

Iris sharpers(Fabric)

Oculus(Forge)

### The light engine has been optimized by

Photsponer(Fabric1.16.5)

Radon(Forge1.16.5)

Starlight(1.17.1~)


 # Useful Mods



WorldEdit(All) and worldEditCUI(Fabric)

JEI (almost all versions)

REI (Fabric 1.16.5 only)

Jonurwary maps(almost all versions)

Xaero's Minimap(Fabric1.16.5,Fabric1.17.1 only)
